chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 1589 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Hearing For hearing of main case. 16-05-2023 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate along with the petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents No.2 to 4-SALU, Khairpur. Mrs. Rizwana Parveen Memon, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for respondent No.5 Learned counsel appearing on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4 through statement files original cheque of Rs. 882,418/- dated 09.05.2023 being pension amount payable to the petitioner, which is received by the petitioner under endorsement on the statement. It is categorically stated by learned counsel for the respondents that no amount is payable to the petitioner against the pensionery benefits. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
